title: Biapian Frozen Balloons, 20 Pcs Blue Purple Balloons, 12 Inch Metallic Blue Purple Latex Balloon Silver Snowflake Confetti Balloon for Girls Frozen Snowflake Ice Snow Theme Birthday Party Decoration
features: 🎈 20PCS FROZEN BALLOONS SET : These 12 inches latex party balloons include 5pcs pearl light blue balloons, 4pcs pearl light purple balloons, 4pcs matte white balloons, 2pcs metallic blue balloons, 3pcs snowflake confetti balloons, and 1pcs 10m ribbon, providing you with a wide range of color options to make your party or celebration more vibrant.

🎈 HIGH QUALITY BALLOONS: Our blue purple balloons are made of high-quality, safe, non-toxic latex. They are durable and reliable, and you don't need to worry about them tearing or bursting after inflation. They can be filled with air or helium. Our snowflake party balloons are vacuum-packed to prevent them from breaking easily, and they are safe for children to use and play with.

🎈 WIDE APPLICATION : Our frozen balloons set is a vibrant decoration that adds a touch of elegance to any occasion. Whether it's a birthday party, frozen theme party, ice snow theme party, baby shower, anniversary celebration, wedding, graduation party, or bridal shower, these snowflake balloons are the perfect choice, adding a touch of glamour and creating lasting memories for your special party.

🎈 EASY TO ASSEMBLE: Accompanied by a silver ribbon, allowing you to easily decorate and hang the balloons, creating a beautiful and glamorous atmosphere. We also include confetti for you to add to the balloons. Simply fill the balloon with air or helium, and then rub it with a dry towel or your hair. You can choose to fill it with helium and the balloon will float, which works great.

🎈 CUSTOMER SERVICE: If you want to make your party more memorable, Biapian balloon decorations will be the right choice. We strive for customer satisfaction, so if you have any questions about helium balloon decorations, please contact us. We will reply to you within 24 hours. Please buy with confidence.

This party balloon set is perfect for girls, boys birthday parties, theme parties, holidays, weddings, engagement parties, bachelorette parties, baby showers, bridal showers and other festive occasions. Add fun to your party with balloons! 20PCS Frozen Balloons for Your Party These colourful balloon sets come with 1 roll of ribbon, our balloons will perfectly decorate your party and play easily to any location. Previous page Next page Product Details HOW TO USE CONFETTI You just need to fill the balloon with air or helium, then rub it with a dry towel, hair, etc. The confetti will stick to the balloon. WHAT YOU GET Both air and helium supported. Perfect for creating a stunning balloon arch, balloon garland, or balloon bouquet. WIDE APPLICATION Perfect for weddings, birthdays, baby showers, graduations, anniversaries, corporate events, engagements, bachelorette parties, bridal showers. HIGH QUALITY Our birthday balloons is made of high quality, safe, non-toxic latex, durable, safe and reliable, don't worry about tearing or bursting.
